name: Grow State Request
description: Request to update the grow state.
comment: Grow State Request: Protocol request ERD with internal request IDs, not user-facing.

name: Grow State
description: The current grow state.
comment: Grow State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Displayed Grow Chamber Request
description: Used to request a specific grow chamber to be visible.
comment: Displayed Grow Chamber Request: Enum writable select.

name: Displayed Grow Chamber
description: Used to determine the visible grow chamber.
comment: Displayed Grow Chamber: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Display Light Intensity Setting Request
description: Request to update the display light intensity setting.
comment: Display Light Intensity Setting Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: Actual Display Light Intensity
description: The actual display light intensity.
comment: Actual Display Light Intensity: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: In Home Grower Door Status
description: The state of the door.
comment: In Home Grower Door Status: Door status sensor with multiple fields.

name: Grow Request Response
description: Response to the grow state request.
comment: Grow Request Response: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Mixing Spraying Data Request
description: Defines the mixing-spraying data.
comment: Mixing Spraying Data Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Growing Data Integrity Request
description: Defines the growing data integrity. Major and minor versions are used to check that the cloud and embedded software are synchronized. CRC is calculated using common grow data, mixing-spraying data, and grow profiles ERDs respectively.
comment: Growing Data Integrity Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Actual Growing Data Integrity
description: Reports the actual growing data integrity. Major and minor versions are used to check that the cloud and embedded software are synchronized. CRC is calculated using common grow data, mixing-spraying data, and grow profiles ERDs respectively.
comment: Actual Growing Data Integrity: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Defines the grow profile for chamber 1
comment: Grow Profile Chamber 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Defines the grow profile for chamber 2
comment: Grow Profile Chamber 2: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Grow Profile Chamber 3
description: Defines the grow profile for chamber 3
comment: Grow Profile Chamber 3: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: The water intake configuration.
comment: Water Intake Configuration: Enum writable select.

description: Request to enter paused mode.
comment: Paused Mode Request: Protocol request ERD with internal request IDs, not user-facing.

name: Display Chamber Remaining Minutes
description: The display chamber remaining minutes before rotation.
comment: Display Chamber Remaining Minutes: Single numeric read-only sensor.

data.name: Actual Display always on feature state

comment: Actual Display always on feature: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

comment: Actual growing week chamber 2: Single numeric read-only sensor.

comment: Actual growing week chamber 3: Single numeric read-only sensor.

comment: Nutrient Cartridge Level 5: Multi-field enum sensor, may need custom handling.

name: Clean Cycle Request
description: Used to request a clean cycle. The request ID is a randomly generated number that is sent with each Write
comment: Clean Cycle Request: Protocol request ERD with internal request IDs, not user-facing.

description: The clean cycle request result. Request ID is the id from Clean Cycle Request ERD
comment: Clean Cycle Request Result: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Paused Request Result

comment: Paused Request Result: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

comment: Paused Mode Status: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

Fresh Water Tank Will Need Filled Soon Alert

description: Multiple packed ERDs for remote debugging and monitoring.
comment: Packed Debug ERDs 2: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Multiple packed ERDs for remote debugging and monitoring.
comment: Packed Debug ERDs 4: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Power Outage Count
description: Reports the number of power outages since the unit was initially powered up.
comment: Power Outage Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: System Startup Time in Minutes After Last Power Outage
description: Reports the time in minutes when the unit was powered up after the last power outage.

data.name: System Startup Time After Last Power Outage (Minutes)

comment: System Startup Time in Minutes After Last Power Outage: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Barcode Scan History
description: The data for the last scanned barcode.
comment: Auto-suggested: Barcode Scan History

name: SBC Request To Power Off Barcode Scanner
description: Used by the SBC to request powering the barcode scanner off
comment: SBC Request To Power Off Barcode Scanner: Boolean writable switch.

name: Variable Cube Size Setting Data 0
description: Used to publish the number of cube size settings and the default cube size.
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Setting Data 0

name: Variable Cube Size Request 0
description: Used to request the desired ice cube size. Maximum cube size is defined in ERD 14BD
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Request 0

name: Variable Cube Size Status 0
description: Used to read the cube size setting status after ERD 14BE is written.
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Status 0

name: Variable Cube Size Setting Data 2
description: Used to publish the number of cube size settings and the default cube size.
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Setting Data 2

name: Variable Cube Size Request 2
description: Used to request the desired ice cube size. Maximum cube size is defined in ERD 14C0
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Request 2

name: Variable Cube Size Status 2
description: Used to read the cube size setting status after ERD 14C1 is written.
comment: Auto-suggested: Variable Cube Size Status 2

name: Dimmable Lighting 0 Warmth Percentage Request
description: Request to set the warmth percentage for lights to a value between 0 and 100 percent.
comment: Auto-suggested: Dimmable Lighting 0 Warmth Percentage Request

name: Dimmable Lighting 0 Warmth Percentage Setting
description: The response to a warmth percentage request for lights with the actual percentage setting.
comment: Auto-suggested: Dimmable Lighting 0 Warmth Percentage Setting

name: Secondary Feature Pan Filtered Temperature Resolved
description: Used to report the resolved filtered average temperature from the secondary feature pan

data.name: Secondary Feature Pan Filtered Temperature Resolved (fahrenheit x 100)

comment: Auto-suggested: Secondary Feature Pan Filtered Temperature Resolved (device_class inferred from name keyword, unit inferred from field name pattern, state_class inferred from device_class)

name: System Power Off Request
description: Used to request system power state for specific loads
comment: Auto-suggested: System Power Off Request

name: System Power Off Status
description: Used to report power state of specific system loads
comment: Auto-suggested: System Power Off Status

name: Scanned Barcode Result
description:
The result after a barcode is scanned.
This ERD is written to the unit after the barcode scan history ERD 0x141F event is processed by the cloud.
comment: Auto-suggested: Scanned Barcode Result

name: Machine State
description: The current state of the laundry machine.
comment: Machine State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Sub Cycle State
description: The current sub-cycle of the laundry machine.
comment: Sub Cycle State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Remote End Of Cycle State
description:
Specifies whether the laundry machine has ended the current cycle.
Used to notify the remote user that the cycle is complete.
comment: Remote End Of Cycle State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Remaining Cycle Time
description:
The amount of time in seconds remaining before the laundry cycle completes.

Depends on
  - 0x2000 Machine State Must be Run.
comment: Remaining Cycle Time: Timer/duration value.

name: Tank Status
description: The state of each of the laundry tanks.
comment: Tank Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Tank Selected
description: Specifies which of the laundry tanks are selected.
comment: Tank Selected: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Laundry Current Selected Cycle
description:
The currently selected cycle of the laundry machine.
- Note 1: The data field in this file is also used by 0x206B and 0x20A7.
- Note 2: A change in this file requires a corresponding change in 0x20A8.
comment: Laundry Current Selected Cycle: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Laundry Operating Mode
description:
The mode of operation for the laundry machine.

Notes
- This is really a legacy ERD and in the past was not a member of any API.
- It has recently been added to an API to be future compatible.
comment: Laundry Operating Mode: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Delay Time Remaining Minutes
description:
The amount of delay time remaining in minutes.

Depends On
- 0x2000 Machine State must be DelayRun or DelayPause.

Note: some Mabe products have this ERD incorrectly implemented as writable. The app depends upon this being writable for these products.
comment: Delay Time Remaining Minutes: Timer/duration value.

name: Lid Switch State
description: Current state of the door/lid'
comment: Lid Switch State: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Lid Lock Actual State
description: Lid/Door lock state
comment: Lid Lock Actual State: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Add Garment
description: Indicates when it is ok to add a garment to the machine.
comment: Add Garment: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Legacy - Washer Remote Soil Level Option
description: Specifies the option value for soil level in UI module.
comment: Legacy - Washer Remote Soil Level Option: Enum writable select.

name: Legacy - Washer Remote Wash Temperature Level
description: Specifies the option value for wash temperature level.
comment: Legacy - Washer Remote Wash Temperature Level: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Legacy Remote Spin Time Level
description: Specifies the option value for spin time level.
comment: Legacy Remote Spin Time Level: Enum writable select.

name: Washer Remote Rinse Option
description: Specifies the option value for rinse.
comment: Washer Remote Rinse Option: Enum writable select.

name: Legacy - Dryer Extended Tumble Selection
description:
Specifies Extended Tumble selection.

Notes:
- This is really a legacy ERD and in the past was not a member of any API.
- It has recently been added to an API to be future compatible.
- Maintained for Legacy App Versions
- In legacy units
  - writing to this ERD will set the ExtendedTumble Selection
- Modern units maintain this ERD for compatibility with Legacy Apps
  - writing to this ERD will send a request for this change to 0x2051 Extended Tumble Option Request
  - if enable request is granted then a request is sent to disable EcoDry via 0x2044 EcoDry Option Request
  - 0x201B Dryer Extended Tumble Selection is maintained to match 0x2053 Extended Tumble Option Selection
- Prefer using the Extended Tumble API
comment: Legacy - Dryer Extended Tumble Selection: Boolean writable switch.

name: Dryer Cycle Type
description: Indicates the Cycle Type of the currently selected cycle (Sensor, Timed, Steam...)
comment: Dryer Cycle Type: Enum read-only sensor.

name: End Of Cycle Alarm Notification
description:
Indicates whether an End of Cycle user notification is required.

This ERD will change to "User notification required":
- After some duration of time has passed since entering the End Of Cycle state and
- the user has not opened the lid/door and
- has not started a new cycle.

This ERD will change back to "No user notification required"
- When the user starts a cycle or
- opens the lid/door.
comment: End Of Cycle Alarm Notification: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Connected Select Cycle
description: Specifies Connected Selected Cycle.  When writing to connected cycle Erd, the value must be one that is listed by the available connected cycle Erd 0x2021.
comment: Connected Select Cycle: Enum writable select.

name: Available Connect Cycles
description: Returns the cycles that are available to be selected via 0x2020. If all values are '0' then no connect cycle is available.
comment: Available Connect Cycles: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dryer Sheet Usage Configuration
description:
Specifies the number of dryer sheets the customer will typically use in a cycle for Small, Medium, Large, Extra Large and timed dry cycles.

Only Small, Large and Timed Dry configurations are used at this time.

data.name: Small Load Size Dryer Sheets Per Cycle
Medium Load Size Dryer Sheets Per Cycle
Large Load Size Dryer Sheets Per Cycle
Extra Large Load Size Dryer Sheets Per Cycle
Timed Dry Dryer Sheets Per Cycle

comment: Dryer Sheet Usage Configuration: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Dryer Sheets Remaining
description:
Remaining number of dryer sheets

Depends on
  - 0x2022 Dryer Sheet Usage Configuration
    - Device will decrement 0x2023 Dryer Sheets Remaining according to 0x2022 Dryer Sheet Usage Configuration as cycles are run.

When updating 0x2023 Dryer Sheets Remaining, it is the client's responsibility to determine the value to write.
comment: Dryer Sheets Remaining: Single numeric writable value.

name: Warm Rinse Option
description: Specifies the option value for warm rinse.
comment: Warm Rinse Option: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Drain Pump Actual State
description: Specifies the current state of the drain pump.
comment: Drain Pump Actual State: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Drive Motor Target Basket Speed
description: The target basket speed in RPM. Positive target indicates clockwise, negative target indicates counter clockwise.
comment: Drive Motor Target Basket Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Actual Basket Speed
description: The current basket speed. Note direction is not reflected in this value.
comment: Actual Basket Speed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Valves Actual State
description: The states of all the water valves in the system.
comment: Water Valves Actual State: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Max Water Level
description: The maximum water level seen in the system since ERD reset.  ERD is 0 on initial creation and is stored in nonvolatile memory.  If the ERD is never reset externally it represents the max water level seen for the life of the system.

data.name: Max Water Level Inches of water x 1000 (inches)

comment: Max Water Level: Single numeric writable value.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Small
description: Number of times a cycle has been run with the "small" setting of smart dispense. Count should be increased upon cycle end. Counter should not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Small: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Medium
description: Number of times a cycle has been run with the "medium" setting of smart dispense. Count should be increased upon cycle end. Counter should not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Medium: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Large
description: Number of times a cycle has been run with the "large" setting of smart dispense. Count should be increased upon cycle end. Counter should not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Large: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Auto
description: Number of times a cycle has been run with the "auto" setting of smart dispense. Count should be increased upon cycle end. Counter should not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Auto: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Remote Set Delay Start Minutes
description:
Write this ERD to set the Delay Start Time in minutes or start the Delay Start
- 0 through 1440 inclusive are allowed values.
- 0 will start the Delay Start cycle immediately.

Depends on:
- ERD 0x2000 must be Delay Run or Delay Pause.
- ERD 0x2039 must be Enabled

Read
- 0xFFFF = Request processed
comment: Remote Set Delay Start Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Remote Status
description:
Indicates if a cycle can be started remotely.

Enabled indicates the ERDs 0x2038, 0x2040 and 0x2041 may be written.

ERD 0x2039 is a member of both
- API V1 "Remote Start and Stop"
- API V2 "Remote Start and Stop V2"

API V2 Remote Start and Stop V2 takes precedence.

values.255: Model does not support remote operation

comment: Remote Status: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Less
description: Number of times a Smart Dispense cycle has been run with the "Less" user selection. Count is increased when the cycle ends. The count does not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record Less: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record More
description: Number of times a Smart Dispense cycle has been run with the "More" user selection. Count is increased when the cycle ends. The count does not roll over when it reaches max.
comment: Smart Dispense Usage Profile Record More: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Bulk Detergent Tank Level
description: Amount of detergent left in the Smart Dispense bulk detergent tank.

data.name: Smart Dispense Bulk Detergent Tank Level

comment: Bulk Detergent Tank Level: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Smart Dispense Estimated Loads Remaining
description: Number of Smart Dispense cycles remaining based on detergent level. Signal used internal to the system, do not display to user. Value of 255 indicates unknown number of loads remaining.
comment: Smart Dispense Estimated Loads Remaining: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Bulk Tank Size
description: The size of the Smart Dispense bulk detergent tank in fluid ounces times 10. For models without Smart Dispense the value will be 0. Value of 65535 indicates number of loads unknown.

data.name: Smart Dispense Bulk Tank Size x 10 (ounces)

comment: Bulk Tank Size: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Remote Stop Cycle Request
description:
Write zero to this ERD to stop the currently running, paused, delay run or delay paused cycle.

Depends on:
- ERD 0x2000 must be Run, Pause, Delay Run or Delay Pause
- ERD 0x2039 must be Enabled

ERD 0x2040 is a member of
- API V1 Remote Start and Stop and
- API V2 Remote Start and Stop V2.

API V2 Remote Start and Stop V2 takes precedence.
comment: Remote Stop Cycle Request: Enum writable select.

name: Remote Start Extended Tumble
description:
Write zero to this ERD to start the Extended Tumble part of the current selected cycle.

Depends on
- ERD 0x2000 must be Idle, Standby, or End Of Cycle
- ERD 0x2039 must be Enabled.

API V2 Remote Start and Stop V2 takes precedence.
comment: Remote Start Extended Tumble: Enum writable select.

name: Calibrated Pressure
description: The current calibrated pressure reading in the system in inches of water x 1000.
comment: Calibrated Pressure: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Water Temperature Thermistor
description: The current reported water temperature.
comment: Water Temperature Thermistor: Temperature value with degF unit.

name: EcoDry Option Request
description:
Use this ERD to request a change of ERD 0x2046 Eco Dry option selection.
- Follows the [Option with Bitmapped Allowables](https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.erd-specification/blob/master/docs/clothes_dryer/option_bitmap_allowables.md)

Depends on
- 0x2000 Machine State must not be Idle or Commissioning.
comment: EcoDry Option Request: Binary enum writable switch.
